feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1953 201 1752 83
TR 1802 172 1630 68

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: FINAL FANTASY Ⅸ
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺999,99 → ₺499,99 [₺249,99 ~ ₺999,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺499,99

Application Description

-------------------------------------------------- Due to the size of the application, the download may take a considerable amount of time to complete. The app uses 3.9GB of space. When downloading the game for the first time, you must have more than 4GB of space available on your device. Version updates for the app will use more than 4GB of space. Please ensure that there is plenty of space available on your device before downloading. -------------------------------------------------- ■Description Selling over 5.5million copies since its release in 2000, FINAL FANTASY IX proudly returns on iOS! Now you can relive the adventures of Zidane and his crew in the palm of your hands! Enjoy this classic FINAL FANTASY experience with no additional fees or purchases. ■Story Zidane and the Tantalus Theater Troupe have kidnapped Princess Garnet, the heir of Alexandria. To their surprise, however, the princess herself yearned to escape the castle. Through a series of unusual circumstances, she and her personal guard, Steiner, fall in with Zidane and set out on an incredible journey. Meeting unforgettable characters like Vivi and Quina along the way, they learn about themselves, the secrets of the Crystal, and a malevolent force that threatens to destroy their world. ■Gameplay Features ・Abilities Learn new abilities by equipping items. When fully mastered, these abilities can be used even without equipping items, allowing for nearly endless customization options. ・Trance Fill your Trance gauge as you sustain hits in battle. When fully charged, your characters will enter Trance mode, granting them powerful new skills! ・Synthesis Never let items go to waste. Combine two items or pieces of equipment together and make better, stronger items! ・Minigames Whether it's Chocobo Hot and Cold, Jump Rope, or Tetra Master, there are plenty of minigames to enjoy when you're not off saving the world. You can even earn special item rewards! ■Additional Features ・Achievements ・7 game boosters including high speed and no encounter modes. ・Autosave ・High-definition movies and character models. ーーーーーーー Operating System iOS 15.6 or later Recommended Devices iPhone 7, iPhone 11 Pro Max, iPhone 12, iPhone 14, iPhone 15 Pro, iPhone 16 Pro Max, iPhone 16e iPad Pro (3rd Generation), iPad Pro (4th Generation), iPad Air 5 We cannot guarantee proper performance on devices other than those listed above. Please confirm your device model before downloading this app.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: FINAL FANTASY VIII Remastered
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺999,99 → ₺499,99 [₺449,99 ~ ₺999,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺499,99

Application Description

------------------------------ ・ This application requires approximately 2.55GB to download. Please be sure to allocate the necessary amount of time and space on your device before proceeding. ・ Only one download with a large amount of data will be required while progressing through the game. ・ Since it is a large application, it will take time to download. We strongly recommend connecting to Wi-Fi when downloading. ------------------------------ [Please read before playing] * Entering or leaving vehicles such as cars and the Garden may occasionally get your character stuck between the vehicle and terrain features, or freeze the vehicle in place. This seems to happen more often when you leave your vehicle in close proximity to impassable terrain, or when you try to enter or leave your vehicle during certain scripted events. Currently, the only fix for this is to reload a previously saved game, so please make sure to save your progress often. * Some locations may be difficult to navigate using the Speed Boost (x3). We advise you to turn off this feature in such cases. * Make sure to check the FAQ section of our support page for solutions to common issues: https://support.na.square-enix.com/main.php?la=1&id=442 We apologize for any inconvenience these issues may cause, and thank you again for your interest in our product. ■Summary FINAL FANTASY VIII was first released on February 11, 1999. Beloved by fans, this title has garnered a great deal of popularity even compared to other installments in the FINAL FANTASY franchise, selling more than 9.6 million units worldwide. And now players can enjoy FINAL FANTASY VIII on their smartphone! With renewed character CG, the world of FINAL FANTASY VIII is now more beautiful than ever before. This installment is a remaster of FINAL FANTASY VIII for PC. This application is a one-time purchase. There will be no additional charge incurred after downloading. ■Story It is a time of war. The Republic of Galbadia, under the influence of the sorceress Edea, mobilizes its great armies against the other nations of the world. Squall and other members of SeeD, an elite mercenary force, join hands with Rinoa, a resistance fighter, to fight against Galbadia's tyrannical rule and to prevent Edea from fulfilling her ultimate goal. ■FINAL FANTASY VIII: Release Features ・Guardian Force（G.F.） G.F. are summoned creatures in FFVIII used to protect the protagonists. Call upon them in battle to unleash their might and to increase their power alongside player characters. By junctioning G.F., players will be able to enjoy greater freedom in how they approach battles. ・Drawing Obtain magic in FFVIII by drawing (extracting) it in battle. MP does not exist and players are limited to the number they have in their possession. Magic that has been extracted can be released on the spot or stocked for later use. ・ Junctioning This system allows players to equip G.F. and stocked magic to characters in order to increase their power. ■ Additional Features ・ Battle Assist Max out HP and ATB gauge during battle and activate Limit Breaks at any time. ・ No Encounters Players can choose to turn Battle Encounters on or off. ・ 3x Speed With the exception of certain cutscenes, players can choose to proceed through the game at 3x speed. [Minimum Requirements] iOS 15.0 or higher

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Solo Mini Golf
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺29,99 → ₺19,99 [₺9,99 ~ ₺29,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺19,99

In-App Purchases

  • Pack IV：₺79,99
  • Pack II：₺29,99
  • Pack III：₺49,99
  • Pack I：₺19,99

Application Description

Immerse yourself in a world of solitary enjoyment as you navigate through beautifully crafted courses. Solo mini golf brings the classic game to your fingertips with easy to master controls. Pull the ball aim and release to take your shot with precision. Revel in the satisfaction of the perfect putts as you conquer rounds with obstacles, speed and many more.   Download solo mini golf now and discover the perfect blend of challenge, serenity and solo golfing fun.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Island Story: 100 Days
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

You wake up on the beach of a mysterious tropical island after a shipwreck. Survival is your only goal: build shelter, craft tools, find food and fresh water, and uncover the island's hidden secrets! ■ Simple Controls • Tap to move and gather resources. ■ Survival • Eating wild fruits alone won't satisfy your hunger. • Catch fish in a mini-game, or craft traps for meat. ■ Realistic Health System • Staying healthy is a constant struggle. • Manage a complex system of needs: weight, wounds, hunger, thirst, energy, body temperature, insect bites… ■ Upgrade Your Camp • Gather resources to craft tools and build furniture. ■ Dynamic Weather • Changing weather limits your movements and can disrupt daily plans. ■ Self-Sufficiency • Learn to grow crops, raise goats, and bake bread from scratch. ■ Relaxation • Immerse yourself in natural white noise. --------- No in-app purchases · No ads

entry.title: Notteka | AI Meeting Notes
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → ₺19,99 [₺4,99 ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺19,99

In-App Purchases

  • Monthly subscription：₺599,99

Application Description

Notteka is an AI-powered meeting assistant that makes capturing, transcribing, and summarizing meetings effortless. Key Features: 【Real-Time Transcription】 Tap to record and watch AI convert speech to text in real time. Supports Cantonese, Mandarin, English, and Japanese — perfect for multilingual meetings. 【AI-Powered Summaries】 After your meeting, AI generates structured summaries automatically. Choose from multiple templates to extract key points, action items, and decisions. 【Import Audio & Video】 Import existing audio or video files from your device or other apps. Notteka transcribes them automatically — turn any recording into searchable text. 【AI Chat Assistant】 Ask questions about your meeting content. Quickly find key information, follow up on details, and interact with your notes through natural conversation. 【Smart Organization】 - Meetings automatically grouped by time - Search, edit, share, and copy with ease - Folder-based organization to keep everything tidy 【Multilingual Interface】 App interface available in English, Simplified Chinese, Cantonese, and Japanese. Whether it's work meetings, lectures, interviews, or brainstorming sessions — Notteka is your intelligent meeting companion.

entry.title: EarthBeat - Schumann Resonance
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • Yearly Subscription：₺399,99
  • Monthly Subscription：₺99,99

Application Description

"If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration." -Nikola Tesla KEY FEATURES: - Monitor Earth's Schumann resonance and space weather in one app - Customisable widgets for Home Screen, Lockscreen and Control Center - Real-time aurora prediction with full map view - Live Data: Real-time numerical readings for Schumann harmonics, Kp index, solar wind, and GCP with 24-hour trend charts (EarthBeat Pro) - Advanced burst analysis, Tomsk outage detection and notifications (EarthBeat Pro) - Current Reading Analysis, scientific and spiritual, with 100-250 words every three hours (EarthBeat Pro) - Weekly Tomsk overview with sharing and archive (EarthBeat Pro) - Share Card: Share a beautiful social card of the current EarthBeat status in dark or light theme (Pro: all supported languages) Earth's heartbeat, the Schumann resonance, is generated by approximately 2,000 thunderstorms producing around 50 lightning strikes per second. These create electromagnetic waves circling Earth. Many observe connections between this resonance and collective human consciousness, noting behavioral changes during heightened activity. EarthBeat tracks the Schumann resonance, visualizes space weather indices including the Kp-Index, solar wind, and X-ray flux, and integrates real-time Global Consciousness Project (GCP) 2.0 data. Network Coherence is shown as a colour-coded gauge across five bands, from Normal to Extreme, with 24-hour netvar history on the Live Data page. A dedicated Schumann Aura tab renders the last 24 hours of resonance as four ribbons of light, one per strongest harmonic, with colour, length, and softness encoding frequency, amplitude, and Q-factor, ready to share as a Story, Post, or Square. Designed for iOS 17 and later, EarthBeat offers widgets in various sizes. Tomsk and Cumiana widgets show current measurements, the Full Tomsk Chart displays three-day history, and the Forecast Widget covers four frequencies. Aurora Widgets predict northern lights activity, Live Sun Images show six NASA feeds for monitoring solar flares, and the GCP 2.0 Widget displays the current Network Coherence band. A Schumann Aura Widget mirrors the same 1:1 ribbons-of-light visualisation on your home screen. New features include Enhanced Tomsk Data with Quality Factor, Electromagnetic Background, and frequency forecasts; Complete Aurora Map View; and D-Region Absorption Prediction. Tap any graph for full-screen view with pinch-to-zoom. EarthBeat Pro subscribers get live numerical readings with 24-hour trend charts, advanced Tomsk burst analysis (10/30/60 minutes), custom notifications, weekly Schumann overview with sharing, 10-week archive for tracking patterns, and the ability to reorder the bottom tab bar to match the way they use the app. Your subscription supports server infrastructure and ongoing development. Compare measurements from Tomsk Space Observing System and Cumiana VLF Station while exploring Global Consciousness Project patterns. Detailed information enhances understanding of these research fields. Now available in 9 languages including Simplified Chinese, Japanese and Russian. If you'd like to see additional data sources or have widget ideas, please get in touch. All displayed images are copyright-protected and belong to their respective sources indicated in the app. Privacy Policy: https://asv.pt/earthbeat-privacy-policy/ Terms of Use (EULA): https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
